'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=OXqETcMMNupfC6ZDL_3Jd3Usmhb4otFUa85xhDvTCtA-1773339981-1.0.1.1-zrHh5h9ABL5OG_xar8yYfx5Q2_q9Pn1Mh8oLscrxzWs"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
